name: inter-pull
description: Library with methods to collect post interactions from well known social media platform. The name is a bad pun with "INTERPOL", the international criminal police organization.

scripts.echo_header:
echo '/* inter-pull v1.0.0
 * License: MIT
 * Author: Gabriele Girelli */'
scripts.add_header: npm run --silent echo_header | cat - dist/inter-pull.js > dist/tmp.js && mv dist/tmp.js dist/inter-pull.js
scripts.add_min_header: npm run --silent echo_header | cat - dist/inter-pull.min.js > dist/tmp.js && mv dist/tmp.js dist/inter-pull.min.js
scripts.build: tsc && npm run minify && npm run add_header && npm run add_min_header
